---
name: Scheduled Maintenance
about: Announce a planned maintenance window
title: "[Scheduled Maintenance] <short summary>"
labels: maintenance
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Upptime reads the block below to schedule the maintenance window on the status page.
Use ISO 8601 UTC timestamps. `expectedDown` is a comma-separated list of component slugs:
  app | docs | website

start: 2026-05-25T02:00:00.000Z
end: 2026-05-25T04:00:00.000Z
expectedDown: docs
-->

### What
Brief description of the maintenance and why it's happening.

### When
<date/time with timezone> — expected duration ~Xh

### Impact
Which components may be unavailable or degraded during the window.
